title: Leaf Me Be!
description: Place glow berries under leaves or wherever you want!
body:
Glow berries can't be placed under leaves and some other blocks classed as "non-sturdy" in vanilla.

This mod allows you to place them under leaves, or any block tagged as `#leaf_me_be:supports_cave_vines`

![Glow berries on leaves at night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9583a48ca061fe6b05d00278de3496ec1f2b36bc.png)

***

Like the mod? Buy me a coffee on [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/juiceybeans) to support me!
